Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - Vendor
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: Average time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time elapsed between the start of a case and the execution of Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait when it appears before Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait in variants that end with Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in high-impact incidents (impact = High)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in cases involving product PROD582
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait and the subsequent Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait when preceded by Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait in variants containing multiple waiting states
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait when followed directly by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'
